name: MSI MPG X570S CARBON EK X ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD X570 Chipset - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR4-5300+(OC) - 4x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E AX210 - Custom-Designed EK Monoblock (X570SCAREKX)
shortName: MSI MPG X570S CARBON EK X ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD X570
description: High-end AMD X570 ATX motherboard with PCIe 4.0 support and integrated EK water cooling block for enthusiasts.
